headline: US rig count up seven as prices soar
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was up three this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 259 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 263 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up seven from last week at 588 rigs. A year ago, 544 rigs were active. The count shows that 452 rigs sought oil, up seven from the previous week, and 126 explored ...
